generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental temperature sensor for building monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor for room usage monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light level sensor for visual comfort monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, MDEFramework
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, MDEFramework
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level measurements for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, MDEFramework
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with Building Control System runtime metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and sensor data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and runtime metadata handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tool for creating and updating building models"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMAuthoringService
]

instance MDEFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, NonVisualHealthOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for building system failures and maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based optimization of energy consumption"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting for visual comfort based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, LightingControlAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of lighting for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance BIMAuthoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating and maintaining BIM models using Revit"
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMModelCreationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictions of system failures and maintenance needs"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized energy consumption strategies for facility management"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on visual comfort levels for lighting adjustments"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on non-visual health effects from lighting"
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
]

instance BIMModelCreationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on BIM model creation and updates"
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC settings for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Modular, service-oriented architecture building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring and optimization"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightLevelSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling lighting in building automation system"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for controlling HVAC systems in building automation system"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the digital twin (e.g., for lighting or HVAC adjustments) are transmitted to Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time physical adjustments."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data updates, though specific latency metrics are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular constellation of services orchestrated via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, with BIM as the semantic backbone and Unreal Engine providing interactive visualization, enabling holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from design to operation, with specific focus on the 'as operated' phase for real-time monitoring and optimization during facility management."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated through the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; semantic coherence maintained via MDE to prevent drift, with real-time synchronization ensuring alignment between digital and physical states."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto used for real-time data exchange, though specific network protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP) are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards (e.g., IFC), Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocol standards, and standardized extension points for service integration to ensure interoperability across AECO systems."
]
